name: LinkedIn
description: Exports your LinkedIn profile, work experience, education, skills, languages, and connections using Playwright browser automation.

scopes.label: Your Profile
scopes.description: Your LinkedIn profile including name, headline, location, about, and profile picture

scopes.label: Your Work Experience
scopes.description: Your work experience including job titles, companies, dates, locations, and descriptions

scopes.label: Your Education
scopes.description: Your education history including schools, degrees, years, and grades

scopes.label: Your Connections
scopes.description: Your LinkedIn connections with names, headlines, profile URLs, and date connected
